parsed.generic_mechanism: Preserving dependency order lets a multi-stage argument accumulate support; reversing that order detaches instructions and conclusions from their premises, destroying usable continuity.

paraphrased_evidence.A: It frames readers as trapped rather than weak and aims to dissolve desire, but relies on categorical health and addiction claims, alarming disease imagery, thinly supported efficacy testimony, and universal promises.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It retains the same compassionate, desire-removal thesis and the same overclaims, alarms, and testimonial warrant, but reverses the exposition so summaries, instructions, and conclusions routinely precede their foundations.
